notes: Canonical (sum,total)->status reconciliation contract shared by Python analysis.nf_groups.reconcile_group and TypeScript src/lib/documents.ts documentStatus (IMP-006 / issue #43). Status names are TS-flavored; the Python test maps reconciled->within, over_claim->over, under_claim->under, None->unknown. Band: within iff abs(sum-total) <= 0.05 (inclusive) OR abs(sum-total)/total < 0.05 (strict); else over if sum>total else under; total null/<=0 -> unknown. A unilateral change to either implementation's tolerance constants or comparison operators flips at least one case below and fails that side's contract test. Keep this fixture and both implementations in lockstep.
